scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-debug/shared && npm run build -w @agent-debug/store && npm run build -w @agent-debug/tool-adapters && npm run build -w @agent-debug/diff-engine && npm run build -w @agent-debug/recorder && npm run build -w @agent-debug/replay && npm run build -w @agent-debug/cli && npm run build -w @agent-debug/viewer
scripts.typecheck: npm run build && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/shared && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/store && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/tool-adapters && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/diff-engine && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/recorder && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/replay && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/cli && npm run typecheck -w @agent-debug/viewer
